Name: ALE Combustíveis
Description:
A ALE é a 4ª maior distribuidora de combustíveis do país e possui  20 anos de existência. Filiada ao Sindicato Nacional das Empresas Distribuidoras de Combustíveis e Lubrificantes (Sindicom), a empresa possui uma rede de cerca de 2.000 postos revendedores, gerando aproximadamente 15 mil empregos diretos e indiretos. 

Seus maiores princípios são a inovação, a excelência no atendimento e a transparência em todos os seus relacionamentos. Age de forma responsável e íntegra com seus parceiros, sejam eles consumidor final, colaborador, revendedor ou fornecedor. 

A ALE também respeita as particularidades de cada localidade. Sempre em busca do desenvolvimento sustentável, traz valorização para as regiões em que se instala com qualidade de vida para funcionários e clientes.

Name: Petrobahia S.A.
Description:
Fundada em 1996, a Petrobahia foi uma das primeiras distribuidoras regionais a entrar em operação no país, se tornando sinônimo de empreendedorismo na nova fase que se iniciou no setor de combustíveis. Nessa época, os fundadores da empresa já atuavam na área - com uma rede de postos e uma das mais conceituadas transportadoras do mercado - e decidiram que era hora de uma nova e desafiadora empreitada: formar uma distribuidora de combustível regional com características muito específicas. A ideia, que logo se concretizou, foi atuar junto a pequenas cidades, que não possuíam postos, e em locais não assistidos pelas distribuidoras multinacionais, atendendo de perto às necessidades de cada cliente.

Todo o trabalho foi desenvolvido com muito planejamento e seriedade, logo tornando a Petrobahia reconhecida por duas importantes características: a solidez e a credibilidade. Hoje, a empresa continua aberta à inovação e atenta às oportunidades de mercado, contando com números expressivos: são 19 bases de operações, sendo 06 bases próprias,  e uma rede com cerca de 170 postos revendedores espalhados nas regiões Nordeste, Sudeste e Centro-oeste. Além disso, a companhia ainda possui cerca de 4000 clientes ativos, distribuídos entre grandes consumidores e postos bandeira branca, nas regiões Nordeste, Norte, Centro-oeste e Sudeste. São resultados diretamente ligados ao trabalho de uma equipe amplamente preparada e à manutenção de uma relação forte e fidelizada com nossos clientes. Uma história de sucesso escrita a cada dia e movida a cada novo desafio.

Name: OKKO
Description:
ОККО – флагман холдингу OKKO GROUP. До складу компанії, окрім мережі автозаправних комплексів, входять нафтобази, стаціонарні та мобільні лабораторії контролю якості нафтопродуктів та найбільша в Україні мережа закладів харчування у дорозі, які працюють під брендами A la minute, Pasta Mia та Meiwei. Окрім цього компанія займається постачанням природного газу та електроенергії.

Ключова цінність компанії – люди. 10 тисяч однодумців обрали ОККО як роботодавця,  що надає максимально комфортні умови праці та можливості розвитку. 

Усі наші співробітники офіційно працевлаштовані та забезпечені медичною страховкою. Тренінги, онлайн-курси, практикуми – усе це доступно для кожного із ОККО. В центральному офісі у Львові працює дитяча кімната, де можна залишити малечу, поки батьки на роботі. В нас є власний біговий клуб, футбольні команди та безліч інших об’єднань колег за інтересами. Так, ми любимо разом не тільки працювати, а й відпочивати.

Ми за кар’єрний ліфт. Тому багато з наших керівників виросли в компанії з рядових працівників. 

Війна ще раз довела, що ми всі – родина і тому один за одного горою! Працівники продовжують працювати, навіть в екстремальних умовах, а компанія гідно оцінює зусилля, підтримує та переглядає у бік збільшення заробітну плату та систему преміювання.

З 24 лютого ми не тільки зберегли робочі місця, а й готуємо нові.  Наразі вже закрито чимало вакансій й відкрито багато нових. 
Працівникам, які були змушені покинути домівку під час бойових дій, ми допомогли переїхати у безпечніші регіони України. ОККО компенсувала проживання їх та їхніх родин протягом 2 місяців, також компанія забезпечила робочими місцями. 
Наразі загальний розмір допомоги наданої за сприяння компанії на потреби оборони й підтримки потерпілих від війни станом на кінець травня склав вже 50 мільйонів гривень.

Поступово ми відновлюємо роботу зруйнованих АЗК. З часом відбудуємо разом економіку та країну. Тож приєднуйтесь та давайте пліч-о-пліч будувати краще майбутнє!

Visita nuestra web:  http://www.pbf.com.pe/

Name: Equador Energia
Description:
A Distribuidora Equador faz parte de um forte grupo pernambucano, e é formado além da Distribuidora Equador, pelas empresas: TFB - Terminais Fluviais do Brasil  (Logística em armazenagem) Dislub Combustíveis Ltda. (distribuidora de combustíveis líquidos), Petroenergia Ltda. (importadora e distribuidora de coque de petróleo) e Arla Brasil.

A Distribuidora Equador de Produtos de Petróleo Ltda., iniciou suas atividades em 10 de julho de 2002, em Manaus e Boa Vista. Hoje, atende os estados do Amazonas, Rondônia, Acre, Roraima e parte do Pará, através de suas cinco bases: Manaus, Rio Branco, Santarém, Vilhena e Porto Velho, sendo à base de armazenagem de combustíveis líquidos mais moderna da região Norte dentre todas as existentes, com capacidade total para armazenar 9 milhões de litros.

A Base de Manaus dispõe de oito tanques de armazenamento de combustíveis, totalizando 9,1 milhões de litros.
 
O álcool anidro e o hidratado que abastece os estados do Amazonas, Acre, Pará e Roraima, é proveniente das usinas/destilarias do norte de Mato Grosso e vem por rodovia até Porto Velho/RO e segue de balsa até Manaus/AM pelo rio Madeira e via rodovia para as bases em Rio Branco, Vilhena. Para as regiões de Boa Vista e Santarém primeiro vai para Manaus e depois segue para estas cidades.
Toda essa dificuldade operacional utilizando dutos, rodovias e rios, torna o abastecimento da região uma tarefa complexa e desafiadora, mas que já está incorporada à cultura empresarial.

Name: SNPC Distribution
Description:

En effet, la SNPC D est un acteur majeur dans la réussite des activités de la société nationale des pétroles du Congo, tel que le transport ou la distribution.
 
Pour parvenir à atteindre ces objectifs, l’entreprise s’appuie sur son réseau de 26 stations-services à travers le pays, rendant ainsi la vie des Congolais plus agréables dans leur tâches quotidiennes, quelle que soit leur localisation.
 
Dans une démarche d'amélioration continu afin de répondre d'avantage aux besoins de ses clients, SNPC Distribution souhaite étendre son réseau de stations-services.

Our approach is application-driven and performance-first, free from brand bias. The objective is simple — maximize uptime, protect critical assets, and reduce total operating cost.
With strong presence across sugar, paper, steel, cement, textile, molding, mining, infrastructure, power, and general manufacturing industries, we understand continuous operations, high-load conditions, and zero tolerance for downtime.
 Execution defines us.
We don’t just supply products — we own solution selection, consistency, and supply reliability. Backed by robust logistics and in-house transport, we deliver with speed, control, and accountability.
 Multi-brand strength. Multi-solution capability. Real ownership.
For industries that demand results — not excuses — Jai Deva Oil Co delivers with authority.
Powering Industry with the World’s Leading Lubricant Brands.
Not Just a Distributor. A Lubrication & Industrial Solutions Powerhouse.

Name: Petroleumprice.ng
Description:
Petroleumprice.ng is Nigeria’s leading source for comprehensive petroleum industry news, catering to the country’s thriving energy sector. With in-depth coverage on the latest market trends, regulatory updates, and detailed analysis of the downstream sector, petroleumprice.ng serves as a reliable hub for anyone invested in understanding Nigeria's energy landscape. Our platform covers a wide range of topics, including oil refineries, petroleum depots, distributors of petroleum products, petrochemical plants, natural gas distribution, and retail outlets. We provide real-time updates and historical data, enabling our audience to stay informed and make strategic decisions.

For investors, industry professionals, and even the general public, petroleumprice.ng delivers essential insights and analysis, helping to shape decisions on fuel consumption, investment opportunities, and market trends.

Key Features of Petroleumprice.ng

- Real-Time Petroleum Updates: We deliver up-to-the-minute data on fuel prices, supply chain developments, and refinery outputs, providing immediate insights into the Nigerian petroleum market.

- In-Depth Sector Analysis: By covering the intricacies of the downstream petroleum sector, petroleumprice.ng ensures that our readers have access to analysis on petroleum refining, petrochemicals, and distribution networks, which are critical to Nigeria’s economy.

- Comprehensive Data and Historical Records: In addition to real-time updates, we also offer historical data on petroleum prices and industry trends, allowing for deeper analysis and context.

- Investor-Focused Content: Our platform is designed to aid investors in making well-informed decisions, with articles and reports on fuel consumption patterns, regulatory changes, and potential growth areas in the energy market.

Siamo proprietari di nr. 11 impianti stradali, ubicati a Santarcangelo di Romagna (nr.3), Bellaria-Igea Marina (RN), Cesenatico (FC), Ravenna (nr.2), Mondaino (PU), Imola (BO), Argenta (FE) e Villa Bartolomea (VR), oltre ad un dodicesimo in Località S.Ermete di Santarcangelo di Romagna, detenuto in affitto dal 2022. Oltre ai carburanti tradizionali (gasolio e benzina), sono presenti le seguenti tipologie: 
GNL/GNC/GPL/ADBLUE a Santarcangelo di Romagna, Villa Bartolomea e Ravenna Via Classicana 
Solo GNC/GPL/ADBLUE a Santarcangelo di Romagna e Ravenna Loc. Savio.
Commercializziamo annualmente circa 120 milioni di litri di carburante di cui 100 milioni in extra rete e 20 milioni circa sulla rete stradale di proprietà.
La distribuzione in “extra rete” avviene sia tramite automezzi di nostra proprietà sia con l’ausilio di una rete di autotrasportatori terzi (ovviamente muniti di tutte le necessarie autorizzazioni) di provata affidabilità.Siamo certificati TUV RHEINLAND per la normativa ISO 9001 (sistema di Qualità) da 15 anni.
Siamo pertanto in grado di soddisfare qualunque esigenza di fornitura di carburanti nelle aree in cui operiamo.

Description:
1997 yılında Opet benzin istasyonu olarak Bornova İzmir’de faaliyete başlamıştır.

       2000 yılından itibaren Türkiye kıyılarında ve serbest bölgelerde transit akaryakıt ticareti faaliyetlerine başlamıştır.

        2003 yılında kendi kamyonlarıyla yurtiçi nakliye işine başladı ve 2006 yılında organizasyon belgesi olarak R1 belgesi sahibi oldu. Tüm Türkiye çapında kıymetli müşterilerine konvoy ve parsiyel taşıma hizmetleri sunmaktadır.

       2004 yılında deniz akaryakıt ticaret hacminin artmasından dolayı 850 DWT kapasiteli gemisi olan Akıntürk2’yi filosuna dâhil etmiştir.2005 yılından itibaren Ege Bölgesi ağırlıkta olmak üzere toptan akaryakıt satış ve dağıtımına başlamıştır.

      2005 yılında ÖTV’siz akaryakıt bayiliği almıştır. Aynı yıl içerisinde değişen petrol yasası gereği pozisyonuna uygun olarak her türlü bayilik dağıtım lisanslarını almış olup bir nevi serbest dış ticaret lisansı olan ihrakiye teslim lisansına sahip olmuştur.

      2007 yılında kartlı araç tanıma sistemi olan OPET Otobil sistemini Ege Bölge distribütörü olarak tanıtma ve kullanıma sunma yönünde yeni bir departmanla faaliyete başlamıştır.

      Tüm bunlarla birlikte, akaryakıt dolum tesisleri ve iskelelerine yönelik tank aksesuarları ve iskele ekipmanlarını imal eden uluslararası tanınmış firmaların da temsilciliklerini yürütmektedir.

Güvenli Akaryakıt Sistemi (GAS) olarak isimlendirdiğimiz Akaryakıt Otomasyon Sistemini geliştirdik. Şimdiye kadar sistemimizin kurulumunu yaptığımız şantiyelerde, %4'den %20'ye varan oranlarda akaryakıt tasarrufu sağladık.
 
İşletmelere uyumlu ve çevreye duyarlı ürünlerimizle, müşterilerimizin doğru fiyata en iyi çözümü almasını amaçlıyoruz. Sürekli yenilik yaparak, müşterilerimize özel çözümler sunabiliyor, kaliteli ürün tedariği ve uzman desteği sağlıyoruz.
 

Vizyonumuz: Enerji sektöründe, Türkiye'nin saygı duyulan, tercih edilen, sürdürülebilir büyüme ve kar elde ederken, iş ortaklarına fayda sağlayan güvenilir bir akaryakıt şirketi olmaktır.

Name: NP Sierra Leone
Description:
By way of introduction, the history of NP (SL) can be traced as far back as 1954 when British Petroleum acquired 100% equity from Atlantic West African Oil Company which was managed and Operated by Paterson Zochhonis.

In 1977, British Petroleum acquired the shares of AGIP and operated until June 1984 when the Government of Sierra Leone acquired 60% shares from British Petroleum Sierra Leone Ltd. and this new company became Sierra Leone National Petroleum Company.

Towards the end of 1984, British Petroleum Sierra Leone Ltd. divested their remaining 40% of the company’s equity to the Precious Minerals and Mining Company an indigenous company in Sierra Leone.

In 1996, the company was privatized in which government sold 55% of its 60% equity to Leone Oil and the remaining 5% to its staff. It is a 100% wholly owned indigenous company.

In February 2011, in a bid to rejuvenate and reinvigorate the company, Sierra Leone National Company was rebranded and changed its name to NP (SL) Ltd.

1985 yılında kurulan Anadolu Akaryakıt Tic. Ltd. Şti. her geçen yıl daha başarılı ve değerli bir şirket haline geliyor.
Shell & Turcas Petrol A.Ş. ve Petrol Ofisi A.Ş. gibi sektör liderlerinin bayisi olan firmamız her iki marka adına işletmiş olduğu istasyonlara ek olarak ; geniş araç filosu ile Toptan Akaryakıt satışı, Shell & Turcas Petrol TTS ve Petrol Ofisi AutoMatic distribütörlüğünde sektörün liderleri arasında yer alıyor.
Vizyonumuz faaliyet gösterdiğimiz Perakende Akaryakıt, Ticari Akaryakıt ve Taşıt Tanıma sistemleri distribütörlüğünde sektörün en iyi hizmet veren şirketi olmak. 
Müşteri odaklı bir yaklaşımı benimseyerek müşterilerimizin tercih ettiği iş ortağı olmayı amaçlıyor, bu doğrultuda şirketimizi satış ve hizmet şirketine dönüştürüyoruz. Müşterilerimize destek olmak amacıyla ticari yetkinliklerimizi geliştirmek için yatırım yapıyor, müşterilerimizle birlikte büyümek için dijital erişim altyapımızı genişletiyoruz. 
Anadolu Akaryakıt ailesine katılan her yeni üye ile genişleyen portföyümüz sahip olduğumuz sürdürülebilir büyüme stratejilerimiz sayesinde geliştirmeye devam ediyor ve iş ortaklarımıza kattığımız değeri daima ön planda tutuyoruz.

Name: Eastern Lubricants Blenders PLC
Description:
Eastern Lubricants Blenders PLC was registered as a lubricants blending company in 1963 as a joint stock company named “East Pakistan Lubricants Blenders Limited” and started commercial operations from 1964. Later, from 1977 Eastern Lubricants Blenders Limited was incorporated as a subsidiary of Bangladesh Petroleum Corporation (BPC).
Currently, BPC owns 51% of the shares of ELBPLC and the rest of the shares are owned by individual investors and various institutions.
ELBPLC's core business is Lubricants Blending. In order to ensure the supply of lubricants oil in the country as part of energy security, ELBPLC have been working on importing base oil and blending lubricants as per the demand of BPC's three subsidiaries Padma Oil Company Limited, Meghna Petroleum Limited and Jamuna Oil Company Limited. 
Also as part of business diversification, BPC granted bitumen marketing to ELBPLC from 2019. In line with this, Eastern Lubricants Blenders PLC currently supplies bitumen to 6 City Corporations and various national priority projects of the Government as directed by BPC.

 Tecnología avanzada: Desarrollamos y aplicamos tecnologías de última generación en la formulación de nuestros lubricantes y grasas, lo que garantiza un rendimiento superior y una mayor vida útil de los equipos.

Name: Penn Petroleum Co. Inc.
Description:
Founded in 2024 in the Territory of the Virgin Islands (Br.), Penn Petroleum Co. Inc. (“Penn Petroleum Co.” or “the Company”) was established as a strategic energy operator, focused on supporting the development, distribution, and long-term security of petroleum and energy infrastructure across the Virgin Islands and the British Caribbean region. The Company operates with a clear mandate to deliver dependable, compliant, and responsibly managed petroleum solutions that ensure continuity of supply and underpin economic activity, mobility, and essential services throughout the territory.

Penn Petroleum Co. functions as a privately held operating company within the Cedar Equity Ventures conglomerate and operates as a non-branded subsidiary within the group’s broader portfolio of energy and infrastructure assets. Positioned at the intersection of petroleum distribution, downstream energy infrastructure, and emerging transition technologies, the Company operates as one of Cedar Equity Ventures’ blockchain-integrated energy entities. As a Cedar Equity Ventures-directed subsidiary, the Company’s operations are supported by blockchain-enabled systems that strengthen governance, regulatory compliance, reporting, and supply-chain transparency, while reinforcing operational reliability and ensuring continuity of supply across both commercial and consumer markets.

At its core, Penn Petroleum Co. specialises in the wholesale and retail distribution of refined petroleum products and related energy solutions, serving a diverse customer base that includes commercial enterprises, transport operators, industrial users, and institutional clients. The Company’s product portfolio encompasses gasoline, diesel, specialty fuels including jet fuel and high-performance racing fuels for automotive and marine applications, along with lubricants, diesel exhaust fluids (DEF), and other essential petroleum-based products, all structured to meet the logistical requirements of the territory.

Name: Kairos Oil Trading Pte Ltd
Description:
The team at Kairos consists of likeminded professionals, all of whom possess diverse experience in the oil industry. Besides having a wealth of industry network and expertise, the team also shares an unwavering commitment to add value to the hydrocarbon supply chain resulting in a win-win formula for both Kairos and our counterparties.

As a testament to the reputation of the team, Kairos has secured credit line facilities from first class international banks and is registered to trade with numerous national oil companies, oil majors, refineries, trading houses and end users across the global trading platform. From its incorporation in 2012, it took Kairos less than 2 years to reach an annual turnover of USD1 billion, trading more than 14 million barrels of crude and petroleum products. By the middle of 2023, Kairos had traded more than 40 million tonnes of oil, and reached a total turnover of USD20 billion. Currently, the company has expanded in the region with the incorporation of Malaysian and Hong Kong subsidiaries and has long term plans for establishing subsidiaries in other regions.  Kairos also incorporated Sea Swift (Pte Ltd) in 2016 to manage all its chartering requirements using both spot and time charters.

The fossil energy industry has seen great transformation in recent years, with a drive towards cleaner fuels and more sustainable energy sources. Kairos is committed to adapting to such market changes wrought by climate change awareness and to continue to add value to our customers responsibly as the industry transforms.

Name: SOCAR PETROLEUM QSC
Description:
“SOCAR PETROLEUM” QSC neft məhsullarının alqı-satqısının təşkil edilməsi və çoxsahəli nəqliyyat infrastrukturuna, beynəlxalq standartlara uyğun, keyfiyyətli təchizat xidmətinin həyata keçirilməsi məqsədilə 15.09.2008-ci ildə təsis edilib və “SOCAR” brendi ilə kommersiya fəaliyyətinə başlayıb. Hazırda ölkəmizdə sayı günbəgün artan YDS-lərin 71-i  “SOCAR PETROLEUM”un payına düşür. Şirkətin 1 Sıxılmış Təbii Qaz Terminalı və 13 Neft Bazası Sahəsi var.

2021-ci ildə etibarən Cəmiyyətin Qarabağ və Şərqi Zəngəzur iqtisadi rayonlarında da YDS-ləri istifadəyə verilib. Hazırda Şuşa, Laçın və Ağdam şəhərlərində, Qubadlı (Eyvazlı kəndi), Xocavənd (Hadrut qəsəbəsi), Cəbrayıl (Şükürbəyli) rayonlarında SOCAR brendli YDS-lər fəaliyyət göstərir. Bununla da Qarabağ və Şərqi Zəngəzur iqtisadi rayonlarında SOCAR brendli YDS-lərinin sayı 9-a çatıb. Qeyd edək ki, ölkə ərazisində fəaliyyət göstərən bütün yanacaqdoldurma stansiyaları müştərilərə 7/24 xidmət göstərir. 

Xüsusilə qeyd edək ki, Azərbaycanda “SUPER” yanacağının satışı yalnız “SOCAR” brendi ilə fəaliyyət göstərən YDS-də həyata keçirilir. “SOCAR PETROELUM” QSC-nin starateji inkişaf planına uyğun olaraq, ölkə ərazisində müasir standartlara cavab verən “SOCAR” brendli yanacaqdoldurma stansiyalarının sayı dinamik inkişafla artırılır.

Name: Vibe Petroleum
Description:
Vibe Petroleum – Fuelled by WA
Buy Local. Support Local.

Since inception, Vibe Petroleum has had our customers at the heart of all we do, which has enabled us to grow from a small WA startup brand to the state’s largest independent fuel provider. Proudly West Australian-owned, we power communities and industries across Perth, the Southwest, Goldfields, and beyond with reliable, competitive fuel solutions.

From filling your car at one of our 50+ service stations to delivering bulk diesel to remote mining locations, we’re here to keep WA moving.

Why Vibe?
Born in WA, we understand the unique needs of our local customers. Our head office in West Perth, our own fleet of tankers, and our deep industry expertise mean we deliver fuel your way — fast, flexible, and hassle-free.

What We Offer
Retail Fuel
Our 50+ service stations across WA include truck stops designed for drivers, featuring:
• Hi-flow diesel pumps and truck/trailer access
• 24/7 clean amenities and onsite food
• Vibe Fuel Card, accepted at 97% of stations nationwide

Commercial Fuel
From family farms to Tier 1 contractors, we provide:
• Bulk diesel for transport, power generation, and mining fleets
• Self-bunded tank hire (10,000L–110,000L+ fuel farms)
• Advanced fuel management and telemetry
• Flexible terms and fixed-price contracts

Where We Deliver
Our owned-and-operated tanker fleet ensures precise, reliable delivery to:
• Perth metro and industrial zones
• Southwest, Great Southern, and Goldfields
• Kwinana and wider Perth Metro

Ready to Fuel Smarter?
Don’t let fuel be a headache. Whether you’re tendering a project, managing a fleet, or reviewing costs, Vibe’s got you covered. DM us today to explore:
• On-site tank solutions
• Estimating and tender pricing support
• Fuel card benefits
• Emergency or contract supply options (we’re happy to be your backup when others let you down!)

Based in Western Australia, powering WA. Let’s talk fuel strategy — connect with us now!

Name: Gruppo Combigas
Description:
Dal 1984 Combigas si occupa del trading e della vendita all’ingrosso di oil e prodotti petroliferi. Dal 2000 il Gruppo decide di investire nel mondo dell’energia da fonti rinnovabili e dell’efficienza energetica. In questi settori acquisisce progressivamente un importante know-how grazie al quale integra e diversifica il proprio business. 
Oggi il Gruppo è in costante crescita su tutta la filiera dell’energia, è costituito da 5 società integrate e specializzate in diversi settori energetici:
•	Siron Srl: si occupa del trading e della vendita all’ingrosso di prodotti petroliferi, gestisce 11 stazioni di servizio e l’autotrasporto per conto terzi di prodotti oil.
•	Energifera Srl: progetta, costruisce e commercializza sistemi di cogenerazione ad alto rendimento con sistemi proprietari brevettati.
•	Esco Solution: è la energy service company del Gruppo e segue gli interventi di efficientamento energetico nel settore industriale, e le riqualificazioni energetiche del segmento condomini
•	Stone Pine Srl: è la società commerciale attiva nella vendita e realizzazione di impianti FV, sistemi di accumulo, pompe di calore e sistemi di ricarica per la mobilità elettrica al segmento domestico
•	Greenfield Renewables: sviluppa asset di investimento sostenibile come gli impianti agrisolari e agrivoltaici
Nel 2022 abbiamo prodotto 600 milioni di fatturato e ad oggi abbiamo contribuito a creare: 300 MWp di fotovoltaico nel mondo e 440 MWp in sviluppo in Italia; 177 MWp di eolico nel mondo; 200 MWp di Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) in sviluppo e 10 MW di storage per uso domestico in Italia; e più di 200 cogeneratori installati. 
La missione di Combigas è contribuire all’incremento delle rinnovabili nel mix energetico nazionale per questo punta ad essere un importante produttore di energia indipendente (IPP).

Name: IPF NPC
Description:
The 14th international Iran Petrochemical Forum (IPF) will be held on 1-2 May 2023 in Tehran, Iran.

IPF has always been an opportunity for petrochemical technology owners, licensors, financial institutions, commercial companies and producers from across the world to exchange ideas and discuss their latest achievements, successes and solutions through networking.

National Petrochemical Company (NPC), the organizer of the 14th IPF, invites all companies, institutions, scholars, and specialists interested in sharing their experiences and ideas on the following subjects:
introducing their new technologies
presenting their financing solutions and services
explaining the status of their production industries
getting first-hand information on the status quo and the future trends of Iranian petrochemical industry
On the sideline of the Forum, a number of workshops will be held on topics related to the petrochemical industry that could not be fully explored in the main Forum.

At the same time, an exhibition will be held at the venue of the Forum, where exhibitors have the opportunity to present their products and services and capabilities.

Name: Newton Oil Company
Description:
The Newton Family has been involved with the petroleum business for almost 50 years. Our Dad, Cliff Newton started with Standard Oil Company in 1961 in the small town of Dayton, IN serving Tippecanoe and surrounding counties. He provided local farmers and residents with gasoline, diesel fuel, heating oil, lubricants and fertilizer. 

 Cliff started as a one truck operation and eventually purchased Newton Oil's original location on Wilson Street in Lafayette, IN from the Standard Oil Company in 1976. 

 Chuck and Jim have worked for their Dad since they were kids. They mowed, cleaned and did every little job available till they were old enough to drive. Since then, they have purchased Newton Oil Company from their parents and run the company today. 

 Newton Oil Company has expanded their services they provide to farming, transportation, manufacturing, services, grain operations and racing fuel to the entire Midwest and beyond.

Con un’esperienza maturata in oltre 50 anni di lavoro, Dellarosa Lubrificanti è in grado di offrire alla propria clientela competenza tecnica ed assistenza. La profonda conoscenza dei prodotti maturata negli anni le consente di individuare soluzioni ottimali per le applicazioni nel settore dell’autotrazione, sia essa leggera (auto e moto) o pesante (tir, macchine agricole, yacht), dell’industria e delle lavorazioni specifiche. Dispone di un proprio deposito con un’ampia gamma di prodotti e questo consente non solo di soddisfare le più svariate esigenze della clientela, ma di farlo in tempi brevi offrendo un servizio puntuale e tempestivo. Description:

Name: Green OIL
Description:
Bienvenue dans le monde vibrant de Green Oil, la société camerounaise de distribution de produits pétroliers qui s'efforce de transcender les frontières de l'ordinaire pour créer un avenir durable et vert. Au cœur de notre mission réside un engagement inébranlable envers la qualité, la durabilité et l'unité du Cameroun.
Avec plus de 25 stations stratégiquement réparties à travers le pays, Green Oil sert avec fierté la population en fournissant du pétrole, des biocarburants, du gaz naturel et des gaz verts. Mais ce n'est pas seulement une histoire de carburants, c'est une histoire d'engagement envers l'environnement, le vivre-ensemble et le respect des normes éthiques et réglementaires en vigueur.
Green Oil n'est pas seulement une entreprise ; c'est une force motrice qui aspire à intégrer la communauté et à devenir un acteur majeur de l'édifice GREEN WORLD. 
Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure où chaque goutte de carburant que vous choisissez devient un pas vers un avenir plus vert.
Ensemble, façonnons un Cameroun où la durabilité n'est pas seulement un objectif, mais une réalité quotidienne.

Name: Cargo Inspections Group (CIG)
Description:
Founded in 1992, Cargo Inspections Group has operated at the heart of international shipping and trade for more than two decades, offering inspection, analysis and certification services to the oil and commodities communities.

While oil, petroleum and petrochemicals are our specialism, we also offer inspection and certification services for a huge range of other goods, including agricultural products, chemical fertilisers, metals and minerals and general commodities.

From the beginning, Cargo Inspections Group has earned a reputation as industry leaders for our diligence and client-centred commitment – a reputation which has seen us work with some of the biggest names in oil and trade. Our inspections are performed by accredited surveyors, with skilled chemical engineers, master mariners, chemists, marine cargo or engineering officers and inspection management professionals supporting our work at every level.

SERVICES
- SAMPLING & ANALYSIS - At the core of our business is our globally renowned sampling, testing, analysis and certification division, which can assist clients from a range of sectors, from agriculture to energy.
- CALIBRATION - Our dedicated team of European based experts can travel world-wide to provide the latest calibration methods for your shore tanks, storage facilities or ship tanks or any other type of container. Boasting extremely competitive rates and state-of-the-art calibration software, we could help you save both time and money.
- SURVEY - Our independent, third-party inspections – carried out by fully certified and qualified surveyors – can help you verify the quality and quantity of your products, minimising risk and ensuring full compliance with relevant regulatory standards.

Name: PETROBUILDERS
Description:
A partir del año 2014, hemos servido al Ecuador, en el sector público como privado, promoviendo y coordinando procesos en múltiples áreas del sector energético en las regiones Costa, Sierra y Oriente; facilitando y gestionando un permanente contacto y diálogo entre usuarios finales, empresas, autoridades y diferentes actores vinculados a los servicios de la industria energética, contribuyendo a construir y articular relaciones transparentes y consensos para el beneficio y desarrollo del país.

Durante más de 8 años, nuestro trabajo se ha enfocado en articular políticas públicas y estándares técnicos que nos permitan lograr la reactivación, tecnificación, sostenibilidad y competitividad, consolidando al sector energético como un factor estratégico del crecimiento económico del Ecuador, permitiéndonos así brindar asesoría técnica, legal y administrativa en todos los procesos relacionados a los hidrocarburos.

Name: AMS Energy Technologies Inc.
Description:
AMS - The Future of Retail Fuel in the USA 

Say goodbye to conventional fuel stations and embrace the cutting-edge innovation of AMS. We are trailblazing the retail fuel industry in the U.S. with our groundbreaking technology - the patent protected PAGS (Portable Above Ground Stations). No more underground plumbing, no more environmental damage from leaks –  a cleaner, greener, more efficient fueling solution.

AMS is on a mission to bring eco-friendly fuel options right to your doorstep, while taking strides to support local communities and grocers. With our 100% approval rate throughout the United States, we are reshaping the way Americans access fuel. While fuel consumption is at an all-time high, traditional gas stations are closing. AMS is here to provide the most affordable and environmentally conscious fuel experience, while keeping things local.

The standard fueling model with its underground tanks is a thing of the past. AMS offers a financially sound alternative to traditional retail fuel delivery, while simultaneously working towards a bigger purpose. We stand apart from the crowd by introducing the revolutionary C-PAGS - Above Ground Portable Gas Stations with a convenience store nestled between the fuel dispensers, contributing to our goal of ensuring access to fresh local produce and filling the access gap.

With thousands of these portable above ground gas stations already installed worldwide, AMS proudly showcases multiple operational units in the U.S., delivering a successful,clean, seamless fueling experience, all while working tirelessly to preserve the essence of local communities.  We are dedicated to serving your community in every way possible, continuously expanding our offerings to cater to your needs.

Join us on this exciting journey as we reshape the fueling landscape, one portable station at a time.

Anamis Paya Petro Refinery attends to commissioning a plant for producing Anhydride Maleic in capacity of 20,000 Tones per year from the feed of Butane.

Maleic anhydride is the chemical formula C4H2O3. Under the influence of a suitable catalyst, this substance is converted to its isomeric forms, namely fumaric acid and then maleic acid. The appearance of this compound is white crystals. Applications of this product include:
-unsaturated polyester resin
-production of copolymers
-production of succinicides which, except for the use of engine oil additives
-are used in paper coatings
-detergents
-an epoxy hardener
-leather polishing.

Name: JBS - Contemporary Management - Amandayi Energy
Description:
Amandayi Energy is a licensed wholesale supplier of petroleum and liquid fuels for commercial, industrial, and domestic use. Our products range from Diesel, Petrol, Liquefied Petroleum Gas, Paraffin, Jet fuels, and Lubricants, among others.
Amandayi Energy, a division of Amandayi Holdings (Pty) Ltd, is licensed wholesale of petroleum and liquid fuels by the Department of Mineral Resources and Energy. Amandayi Energy is also licensed to import and export petroleum and liquid fuels by SARS and ITAC. 

OUR PRODUCTS

Diesel (10PPM and 50PPM) 

10PPM is a standard grade of diesel with a sulfur content of not more than 10mg/kg. This product is mostly used to fuel heavy vehicles. The greatest demand for this product is for commercial use in the manufacturing, mining, and transportation sectors. 

50PPM is a low sulfur grade diesel with a sulfur content of not more than 50 mg/kg. This product is mostly used in the automotive industry as fuel for light vehicles. 

Petrol (93 and 95 RON) 

This is a Metal containing unleaded petrol containing metal-based additives, other than lead, but including phosphorus with a RON of 91, 93, or 95; and Metal-Free unleaded petrol that does not contain any metal-based additives, with a RON of 91, 93, or 95. 

Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG)

This petroleum product is mainly composed of propane or butane or both. It can be stored as a liquid under relatively low pressure for use as fuel. This product is mainly used for household cooking, hotels/restaurants, and manufacturing processing. 

Paraffin / kerosene 

This is a liquid petroleum product that is a complex mixture of predominately aliphatic hydrocarbons ranging from C9 to C16. It is used mainly for lighting, cooking, and heating purposes. The demand for this product has decreased recently in South Africa, as a result of many households being connected to the national power grid. There are however significant pockets of users in rural and informal areas who still use this product.

Name: Reliable Tank Line LLC
Description:
The United States was in the midst of the Great Depression when Quality Oil Transport was founded in 1934. Despite the overwhelming obstacle, the Company was created under the vision and leadership of Quality Oil Company  as a creative solution to an expensive shipping problem.

Prior to 1934, all of the oil and gas that Quality Oil Company distributed was brought to the area by rail from Wilmington, North Carolina. This mode of transportation was fairly expensive, chipping away at the profit of the young oil company. Quality decided that transporting the petroleum products using transport trucks would be much more beneficial and profitable by rail. Therefore in 1934, Quality Oil Transport was founded with the sole purpose of accomplishing this task. This new venture was very profitable and helped to save a considerable amount of money in transportation costs.

During the years following its creation, Quality Oil Transport flourished and expanded its business to include the delivery of petroleum products for businesses other than Quality Oil Company.  In 1984, the company changed its name to Reliable Tank Line to more properly reflect its common carrier status.

The heritage, vision, and industry leadership continue today under guidance of our President; Graham F. Bennett, and Senior Vice President, Buddy Jenkins.

Name: Iraq Altaqa
Description:
The Iraq Altaqa Bitumen Production Plant is strategically located 20 km south of Karbala, in close proximity to the Karbala Refinery. Currently in the development phase, this advanced facility will incorporate the latest design and control systems to ensure optimal performance. 
The plant is specifically designed for the efficient production of bitumen, with a processing capacity of two streams capable of producing 1000 metric tons per day each, resulting in a total production capacity of 2x1000 metric tons per day. The primary focus is on producing high-quality paving-grade bitumen that meets international standards. 
In addition to the main product Bitumen, the plant will also generate by-products such as LHVO (Light Vacuum Gas Oil) and HVGO (Heavy Vacuum Gas Oil). These by-products contribute to the overall efficiency and value of the plant's operations. 
To maximize productivity and meet market demands, the Bitumen Production Plant is designed for continuous production, operating 24 hours a day. This translates to a total of 8000 operating hours per year, ensuring a steady supply of bitumen for various applications.

Name: COUNSEL LOGISTIC
Description:
Descubre una empresa líder en el apasionante mundo de la comercialización y distribución de gasolina y diésel! Somos expertos en brindar un suministro confiable y de calidad que impulsa a millones de vehículos a lo largo del país. Respaldados por la Comisión Reguladora de Energía, garantizamos un servicio seguro y eficiente para satisfacer las necesidades de movilidad de la sociedad.

En nuestra empresa, la excelencia es nuestro sello distintivo. Nuestro equipo altamente capacitado y comprometido trabaja arduamente para ofrecerte una experiencia única, tanto si eres un conductor ocasional como si gestionas una flota de vehículos. Nos enorgullecemos de mantener una red extensa y bien establecida de estaciones de servicio que se encuentran estratégicamente ubicadas en todo el territorio, lo que nos permite estar cerca de ti, sin importar dónde te encuentres.

Además de brindar combustible de primera calidad, nos preocupamos por el bienestar de nuestros clientes y el medio ambiente. Implementamos prácticas sostenibles y tecnologías avanzadas para reducir nuestra huella de carbono y contribuir a un futuro más limpio y saludable para las próximas generaciones.

Al elegirnos, obtendrás mucho más que una simple transacción de combustible. Nuestra pasión por el servicio al cliente nos impulsa a ofrecerte promociones y beneficios exclusivos, programas de fidelidad y atención personalizada. Queremos que te sientas parte de nuestra comunidad y que disfrutes cada paso del camino junto a nosotros.

Así que no esperes más! Únete a nuestra amplia base de clientes satisfechos y descubre por qué somos la elección preferida en el mercado de combustibles. Deja que nuestra experiencia y dedicación te inspiren a alcanzar nuevos horizontes en tus viajes y actividades diarias. Visita nuestra página web para obtener más información sobre nuestros servicios y promociones, y sé parte del motor que impulsa el progreso y la movilidad en nuestra nación. Te esperamos con los brazos abiertos!

Name: Clear River Fuel Oil
Description:
Clear River Fuel Oil is a local, Veteran Owned Small Business providing full-service heating oil deliveries  along with heating & cooling services in central Connecticut. 
3 Simple Heating Oil Delivery Options: 
Rapid Will Call- Just Call us for a one-time delivery of Heating Oil.  
Available in 50 / 100 / 150 gallon deliveries or we can fill your tank.  
Subscription Auto Delivery- We monitor your tank level so you don’t have to! We track Winter’s cold  and automatically schedule your next delivery to occur when your tank is at 1/3. You’ll never have to  worry about forgetting to check your tank or running out of heating oil. You can cancel your Auto Delivery  any time with just an email, no long-term contracts or gotcha clauses!  
Monthly Payment Subscription Delivery - Divide your annual fuel bill into 12 even, predictable monthly  payments while still having the convenience of automatic delivery. This program takes our Subscription  Auto Delivery one step further, lowering your winter heating bills by spreading them out over the entire  year! It’s the best of both worlds; the ease and security of Subscription Auto Delivery with the  predictability of a monthly budget program. 

Mechanical Service Options: 
● Annual Tune ups 
● 24-7 Service for Heating and Central Air Conditioning 
● Service Agreements 
● High-efficiency Boiler and Hot Air Heating System Replacements 
● Central and Split/Duct Air Conditioning Systems 
● Heating Oil Tank Replacement 

Your choices for a Heating Oil Supplier come down to a few decisions; Reliability, Ease of contact, Value  and Integrity. Call us today to find out how easy and economical it is to heat your home with Clear River. 

Keeping you warm and helping you save money on your energy bills is  simple, it’s what we do.

Name: TROY OIL
Description:
TROY OIL, küresel denizcilik topluluğu ve endüstriyel işletmelere yağ, yakıt ve kimyasal alanlarında hizmet sunan uluslararası bir şirkettir. Ticaret, tedarik ve danışmanlık konularında uzmanlaşan TROY OIL, sektördeki kökleri 1975 yılına uzanan GÜLYURT GRUP bünyesinde faaliyet göstermektedir.
 
TROY OIL, dünya çapında tanınmış geniş küresel (Exxon Mobil, Total Lubmarine, Chevron, BP Castrol, Shell) ve yerel tedarikçi ağına sahiptir. TROY OIL, geniş tedarik ağı sayesinde, birinci sınıf marka ve yüksek kalite ürünlerle, herhangi bir uzak limandaki acil filo ihtiyacınızı yüksek doğruluk, verimlilik ve sorunsuz ikmallerle destekleyebilmektedir. TROY OIL, geniş tedarik ağını, benimsediği destek ve tedarik vizyonu doğrultusunda, sanayi kuruluşlarının özel ihtiyaçlarına göre yönlendirme yeteneğine sahiptir.

TROY OIL Almanya, Yunanistan, Dubai, Singapur ve Mısır’daki ofisleri aracılığıyla, dünyanın her yerindeki müşterilerine, tam ürün kapsamı ve petrol analizlerini de içeren teknik desteği, aktif ekibi ile 7/24 sağlamaktadır. Grubumuz, özenle seçilmiş müşterilerine, yıllık 32 milyon litreden fazla yağ teslimatı düzenlemektedir.

TROY OIL olarak, dünya çapındaki büyük ve yerel tedarikçilerden oluşan geniş tedarikçi ağımızla beraber, çeşitli ürün/marka alternatifleri ile müşterilerimize hizmet vermekten mutluluk duymaktayız.

Для нас важливо, щоб кожен клієнт отримував паливо вчасно і міг бути впевненим у завтрашньому дні.
Ми також розуміємо значення соціальної відповідальності. Власний благодійний фонд «Допомога.АЕТ» реалізує проєкти підтримки дітей та родин в Україні. Допомагаючи сьогодні, ми інвестуємо у майбутнє країни.

We supply gilsonite in powder or lump form, available in various ash content levels (5%, 10%, 15%, and 20%), and offer flexible packaging options including loose, jumbo bags, and pallets.

Description:
From California Dreams To Global Streams
I Still Remember That Sunset Over Modesto, California When I, Alisa, Took The Leap That Would Change Everything. With Just A Vision And Unwavering Determination, I Planted The Seeds Of Oil Link Global – Not Just Another Company, But My Dream Of Revolutionizing Petrochemical Movement Worldwide.

When John Doe At Raisin Industries Faced A Sudden Fuel Shortage Threatening His Operation, We Mobilized Immediately. By Sunrise, Our Tankers Were Arriving. What Began In My Small California Office Has Blossomed Into A Global Family Of 20,000+ Workers Across 700+ Facilities, Completing 2,450+ Projects And Earning 468+ International Awards. Yet What I Value Most Are The Relationships Built On Trust.
While Others Focus Solely On Transactions, We Build Partnerships Through Perfectly Timed Logistics, Unquestionable Quality, Transparent Pricing, Customized Solutions, And A Global Network With A Personal Touch Spanning 20+ Countries.
Our Success Rests On Three Pillars: Creditable Integrity, Living Our Values Daily; Effective Teamwork, Coordinating Complex Global Operations; And Quality Assurance, Ensuring Consistent Excellence.
Today, Our Founding Principle Remains Unchanged: In Petrochemicals, Trust Isn't Just Nice – It's Essential. As Markets Evolve, We At Oil Link Global Continue Adapting While Keeping Our Promise Intact: Powering Industries With Reliability You Can Count On, No Matter Where You Are.

Mit unserem Standort in München und unseren Kontakten in Europa, dem Nahen Osten und Afrika sind wir optimal positioniert, um kontinentale und interkontinentale Handelsströme effizient zu steuern.

Endüstriyel yağlar alanında bölgesinin en yetkin ve donanımlı ekibine sahip firmamız yine bölgenin en geniş; ürün portföyü, depolama alanı, stok miktarı ve ürün yelpazesiyle hizmet vermektedir. Türkiye’de ilk ve tek, bir distribütör tarafında hayata geçilen, 12 adet testi eş zamanlı yapabildiğimiz kendi laboratuvarımız ve içerisinde makine temizliği yapılabilen, 6 adet testi eş zamanlı yapabildiğimiz seyyar laboratuvarımız ile sektörün öncü ve inovatif çalışmalarını yapan Türkiye’de ki tek firmayız. Bayisi olduğumuz firmalardan temin ettiğimiz ürünleri; OTOMOTİV, GIDA, TEKSTİL, KOZMATİK, İLAÇ, PLASTİK, AYAKKABI, SOLAR ENERJİ, SAVUNMA, YEM VE UN SAN, gibi üretimin her aşamasında, imalatın direkt içinde ve imalat yapılan makinelerin sistemlerinde kullandırmaktayız. Ayrıca satışını yapmış olduğumuz bu yağların kullanıldığı fabrikalara tam otomatik merkezi yağlama sistemlerini firma olarak bizzat kuruyor ve fabrikaları; işçilik, tüketim, zaman gibi maliyetlerden kurtararak mühendislik hizmetleri veriyoruz.

Name: Tajir Al Kimiya
Description:
We, Tajir Al Kimiya, are a UAE-headquartered export specialist delivering petrochemical derivatives, refined fuels, and performance additives from the heart of the Gulf to high-growth markets worldwide.
Based in Jebel Ali Free Zone, Dubai, we source directly from ADNOC, ENOC, and partner refineries and export gas oil (EN590), bitumen (VG10, VG30, VG40, PMB), base oils (SN150/500), fuel oil, LPG, naphtha, and specialty additives—including polymer modifiers, viscosity index improvers, pour-point depressants, and anti-oxidants—to refiners, blenders, road contractors, and industrial users across India, East Africa, Southeast Asia, and beyond.
With 30+ years of combined trading and technical expertise, our teams ensure every cargo meets international specifications (ASTM/ISO), passes SGS/CIQ pre-shipment inspection, and arrives on-spec and on-time via FOB Jebel Ali or CFR/CIF destination terms. From 500 MT bitumen trial parcels to 50,000 MT monthly diesel contracts, we manage LCs, marine insurance, and customs clearance seamlessly.

Vision: To be the preferred UAE export partner for quality-assured petrochemicals and additives.

Mission: Export zero-compromise products with full traceability, competitive pricing, and end-to-end logistics.

Tajir Al Kimiya
Jebel Ali Free Zone, Dubai, UAE

Name: Pinkerton Oil Co Inc.
Description:
Since 1973, Pinkerton Oil has been proudly delivering petroleum products and premium service to Northern Illinois/Indiana, and Southern Michigan.

In addition, our Field Sales and Service reps are on call 24/7 for any emergencies emergency our customers may experience 365 days a year.  Breakdowns happen, and they usually happen at the worst possible times of your day.  Our aim is to keep downtime to a minimum so our customers are fueling as efficiently as possible if a problem should occur.

Contact us anytime day or night to speak with a representative, Pinkerton Oil offers you all the right choices for your business fueling needs.

Name: Turbo Petrol SL
Description:
Turbo Petrol SL is an esteemed company at the forefront of the energy industry, specializing in both petrol and renewable energy solutions. With a focus on elegance and formality, we are committed to providing sustainable and efficient energy solutions that meet the highest standards of quality and environmental responsibility.

As a leading player in the field, Turbo Petrol SL prides itself on its formal approach to business, ensuring that every interaction reflects our dedication to professionalism. We have built a team of seasoned experts who possess a wealth of knowledge and experience in both traditional petrol-based energy and cutting-edge renewable technologies.

Our company's mission is to deliver energy solutions that not only meet the demands of today but also embrace the challenges of the future. Turbo Petrol SL understands the importance of reducing our carbon footprint and transitioning to a sustainable energy landscape. Therefore, we are actively involved in researching, developing, and implementing renewable energy solutions that harness the power of natural resources while minimizing environmental impact.

At Turbo Petrol SL, we are committed to providing our clients with a diverse range of energy options. Whether it's supplying high-quality petrol products or delivering innovative renewable energy solutions such as solar, wind, or biofuels, our offerings are tailored to suit the unique needs of each customer.

We recognize that collaboration and customer satisfaction are vital to our success. Turbo Petrol SL prides itself on building long-lasting relationships with our clients, working closely with them to understand their energy requirements and provide customized solutions. Our commitment to excellence extends to our customer service, ensuring that each interaction is characterized by professionalism, reliability, and promptness.

As a forward-thinking company, we aim to drive the transition towards a sustainable and greener future.

Name: Kakanj Petrol d.o.o.
Description:
Privredno društvo Kakanj Petrol d.o.o. osnovano je 2005. godine, kao društvo za veleprodaju, maloprodaju i transport nafte i naftnih derivata.Izgradnjom benzinske pumpe u Kaknju i našim pristupom osvojili smo povjerenje naših kupaca, vlasnika motornih vozila, privrednih društava u Kaknju i šire. Nudimo kvalitetna goriva pete generacije sa količinama sumpora ispod 10 mg/kg. U 2010. godini izgradili smo benzinsku pumpu sa pratećim objektima u Bjelavićima na regionalnom putu Kakanj – Kraljeva Sutjeska.
Benzinska pumpa u Kaknju posjeduje market sa širokim asortimanom prehrambenih artikala, motorna ulja i autokozmetike, kafeteriju Caffe KP i samouslužnu autopraonicu dok benzinska pumpa u Bjelavićima pored ovih sadržaja posjeduje i apoteku te ambulantu porodične medicine, koja je poklon stanovnicima doline Trstionice.
Kakanj Petrol od 2009. godine važi za najvećeg distributera goriva na izgrađenim dionicama koridora “Vc”, te prati izvođače na dionicama od Sarajeva, Visokoga preko Kaknja do Zenice, od Ljubuškog do Hrvatske granice, Počitelja do graničnog prelaza Bijača-Kravice, od Jošanice preko Vlakova do Tarčina i tunela Ivan, od Odžaka do Svilaja. Distribuciju obavljamo sa vlastitim vozilima kapaciteta od 6000 do 32000 litara i dnevno poslužimo i do 600 voznih jedinica na području izgradnje koridora Vc.
Zahvaljujući korektnom odnosu prema poslovnim partnerima, uposlenicima i društvu u cjelini Kakanj Petrol je razvio međusobno korisne odnose zasnovane na povjerenju i vjernosti kupaca.
Zadovoljavamo najveće standarde kvaliteta, što potvrđuju naši klijenti bez obzira da li se radi o građanima ili privrednim subjektima. A koliko smo posvećeni očuvanju životne sredine pokazuje činjenica da su na našim benzinskim pumpama instalirane solarne elektrane “Energy 2” i “Energy 3” instalisane snage od 23kW a “Energy 1” je u neposrednoj blizini benzinske pumpe u Bjelavićima sa instalisanom snagom od 150kW čime doprinosimo smanjenju emisije CO2 plina u atmosferi

Description:
Rising Petroleum is a new company that was established to answer a pressing need in African industry. We all know that fuel and the cost of keeping machinery running efficiently are indispensable for the smooth running of most major industrial concerns. Rising Petroleum can help by offering some of the most highly competitive prices and payment terms in the industry. We aim to help African businesses and Governments ease some of the problems they deal with, by offering a range of complete value chain-service solutions to make operations run more efficiently.

On the extractive side of the business, we offer products and services that enable energy resources to be extracted, transported, processed and distributed to the final consumer. Our services can be tailored to meet your specific needs - whether you are involved in a development plant, refinery or any sector of the extractive industry.

Rising Petroleum also offers its service and petroleum products in the selection and specification of correct fuels that conform with machinery, encompassing old and new technologies. We are thus able to offer site machine inspection to assist clients with correct product specifications and consult on any issues that they may have, pre- or post- contract.

Binnen MPD is in de loop der jaren een schat aan ervaring opgedaan met het installeren van nieuwe motoren en het uitvoeren van reparaties aan koelingsmotoren. Cummins, één van de grootste producenten van dieselmotoren, zag op het gebied van technische knowhow MPD voor vol aan. De motorfabrikant bedrijf schoof MPD naar voren toen bleek dat er meer research nodig was omtrent smeer- en koelmiddelen. Dit resulteerde in drie jaar praktijkonderzoek, dat gebundeld werd in een nieuw bedrijf: MPU Fluid Technology.

Name: West Indies Petroleum Ltd.
Description:
West Indies Petroleum was incorporated in 2012 out of the need to meet the ever growing demand of the region’s marine refuelling as well as the necessity to establish Jamaica as a global logistics hub.

Name: GF Bunker Trade
Description: GF Bunker Trade offers a comprehensive range of marine fuels and essential vessel support products designed to meet the stringent requirements of modern shipping and environmental regulations. Their portfolio includes VLSFO (Very Low Sulfur Fuel Oil), a key IMO 2020 compliant fuel widely adopted in international shipping to significantly reduce sulfur emissions and ensure compliance with global maritime standards. For vessels equipped with approved scrubber systems, they provide HSFO (High Sulfur Fuel Oil), enabling ships to use higher sulfur fuels while still meeting emission limits through exhaust gas cleaning technology. Their supply also includes MGO (Marine Gas Oil), a high-grade distillate fuel suitable for both main propulsion and auxiliary engines, offering excellent performance and reliability. Additionally, they supply LSMGO (Low Sulfur Marine Gas Oil), an ultra-low sulfur fuel specifically formulated for use in Emission Control Areas (ECAs), helping ship operators comply with regional environmental regulations that demand reduced sulfur content in marine fuels. Beyond fuels, GF Bunker Trade provides AUS40, a 40% urea solution crucial for Selective Catalytic Reduction (SCR) systems, which effectively reduce nitrogen oxide (NOx) emissions, further supporting vessels in meeting stringent air quality standards. Furthermore, they offer Caustic Soda (Sodium Hydroxide), an important chemical used in scrubber systems to neutralize acidic components in exhaust gases, as well as for tank cleaning and maintenance, ensuring operational efficiency and environmental compliance. This extensive and carefully curated product lineup enables GF Bunker Trade to deliver tailored fuel solutions and support services that enhance vessel performance, optimize emissions control, and promote sustainability across their key markets in Panama, the Caribbean, and beyond.

They also handle the decanting of imported bitumen and have expanded their scope to include other petroleum products like Furnace Oil (F.O.), L.D.O. (Light Diesel Oil), L.S.H.S. Name: Biotank
Description:
A Empresa é fruto da experiência e da visão de mercado de seus fundadores, que atuando 
na área de transporte de líquidos à granel, identificaram a oportunidade não apenas no transporte, mas também no beneficiamento do resíduo gorduroso. Este resíduo, comum no nosso cotidiano e aparentemente inofensivo, é na verdade, um poluente muito agressivo ao meio ambiente.

HISTÓRIA: Em 2008 com surgimento de incentivo da política de biodiesel no brasil , surge a ideia de usar óleo de fritura usado para este fim , Marcel Wars funda a Biotank , começamos a coletar , tratar e destinar , então começaram vir outros resíduos.

MISSÃO: Acabar com lixo no mundo , tornando os resíduos um benefício para humanidade .

Name: Rede Planalto
Description:
A Rede Planalto existe há mais de meio século. Foi fundada em 1965 pelo Sr. Luiz Chagas e pela Sra. Rosenir Araújo, casal que construiu, tijolo a tijolo, os primeiros postos Planalto.

A primeira unidade estava localizada em Floriano, região Sul do Piauí. O casal migrou para Teresina e o primeiro posto na Capital foi instalado na BR-316. Na década de 1970, já seria um total de 5 postos; em meados da década de 90, foi inaugurado o sexto posto da rede, o icônico Posto 6.

A partir de 2000, a rede inicia um ciclo de dificuldades, quando dá-se a venda gradativa dos postos, restando ainda o atual Planalto 1, arrendado pelo neto do casal de fundadores, Renan Araújo Brito.

Com a missão de fazer diferença no mercado de combustíveis e na sociedade,
a rede se reestrutura, sempre oferecendo produtos e serviços de excelência.

Hoje, são mais de 25 postos da Rede Planalto por toda a cidade de Teresina, a maior rede da Capital. Dona Rosenir segue como inspiração, assim como o Sr. Luiz das Chagas, hoje in memorian.

Assim, buscamos o crescimento e o desenvolvimento pessoal e profissional dos colaboradores, sempre atuando com ética, integridade e respeito. Valorizamos a criatividade e a proatividade. E, juntos, somos referência em processos de gestão de postos de combustíveis e lojas de conveniência!

Name: Efen - Combustíveis Marítimos
Description:
A Efen é mais do que um fornecedor de combustíveis marítimos. Somos um aliado de nossos clientes. 
Nossa marca carrega a reputação construída nos últimos 10 anos de história sob o nome NFX. 
Somos uma JV entre duas potências do mercado marítimo: a bp, uma gigante global de energia, e a Prumo Logística, referência de administração portuária privada no Brasil.
Entregamos nas áreas de influência das Bacias de Campos, de Santos e do Espírito Santo, que concentram as atividades das principais empresas de energia no país. 
Com flexibilidade, disponibilidade, e compromisso inabalável com a segurança e excelência, fornecemos combustíveis marítimos de alta qualidade e soluções logísticas confiáveis e eficientes aos nossos clientes e, lado a lado, planejamos as entregas de acordo com suas demandas. Nosso objetivo é construir conexões e nos manter como parceiros estratégicos e relevantes para os clientes, para que eles foquem no mais importante: seu negócio.
Por aqui, energia e eficiência andam juntas.

Description:
Welcome to GoFuel's LinkedIn Page!

At GoFuel, we're dedicated to leading the charge in the wholesale fuel sales industry, driven by innovation, quality, and strategic vision. Led by our visionary Founder and CEO, Adam Payette, GoFuel has consistently set new standards of excellence since its inception in 2019.

MANUFACTURING EXCELLENCE IN DIESEL EXHAUST FLUID:

As a leading wholesale supplier of petroleum products, GoFuel ensures reliable access to top-tier fuels and lubricants for businesses worldwide. Leveraging strategic sourcing and distribution networks, we deliver exceptional value and service to our clients, driving their success in competitive markets.

GAS STATION PODS IN CENTRAL AMERICA:
In Central America, GoFuel is revolutionizing the fuel retail landscape with our innovative Gas Station Pods. These modular and efficient fueling solutions offer convenience, reliability, and sustainability, empowering communities and businesses to meet their energy needs with ease.

EXPANSION INTO CENTRAL AMERICA:
GoFuel's expansion into Central America underscores our commitment to delivering cutting-edge fuel solutions to emerging markets. Through strategic partnerships and localized expertise, we're making a significant impact in the region, providing essential energy infrastructure and driving economic growth.

As we continue to innovate and expand our footprint, GoFuel remains steadfast in our mission to fuel success for our partners and customers worldwide. Join us in shaping the future of the fuel industry!

Shobeir Shimi, founded in 2004, is a leading independent distributor of raw materials for the polymer, chemical, and paint industries. Since our inception, we have proudly served a wide range of manufacturers across various sectors with a broad, diversified, and up-to-date product portfolio.

With a strong foundation in technical expertise, an extensive sales network across local and international markets, and a commitment to customer-centric service, Shobeir Shimi has earned a trusted reputation throughout the region and beyond. We aim not only to be a supplier but also a reliable business partner who supports our clients every step of the way.

Our product offerings include a comprehensive range of essential and high-performance materials, such as:

Standard Polymers: #Polyethylene (PE), #Polypropylene (PP), #Polystyrene (PS), and PVC

Engineering Plastics: ABS, #Polycarbonate (PC), #Polyamide (PA), and #PET

Chemical Additives and Resins: Tailored for the paint, ink, resin, and industrial coating industries

Sustainable and Eco-Friendly Materials: Supporting green solutions and long-term environmental responsibility

At Shobeir Shimi, we believe that our customers' success is our success. That’s why we go beyond distribution—offering technical consultation, market insights, and responsive support to help our partners grow and thrive in today’s competitive landscape.

Transporte de derivados de petróleo

O Grupo Cavalo Marinho é uma empresa sólida e confiável, com mais de 40 anos de experiência no mercado. A empresa é uma referência no fornecimento de derivados de petróleo no Nordeste do Brasil.

Name: RSL CHILE
Description:
En RSL Chile, nos enorgullece ofrecer una amplia gama de servicios de seguridad especializados en entornos de alto riesgo para la industria petroquímica e industrial en Chile. Nuestro equipo altamente capacitado y experimentado está preparado para abordar desafíos en trabajos de altura, espacios confinados y atmósferas peligrosas.

Nuestros servicios incluyen la planificación y ejecución de trabajos en altura, asegurando que se cumplan los estándares de seguridad más rigurosos y utilizando equipos y técnicas de vanguardia para garantizar la protección de los trabajadores. Además, brindamos soluciones para trabajos en espacios confinados, aplicando procedimientos meticulosos y protocolos de seguridad para minimizar los riesgos y garantizar un entorno seguro.

En cuanto a las atmósferas peligrosas, contamos con expertos en monitoreo y control de gases, implementando medidas de prevención y protección para garantizar la seguridad en entornos donde pueden existir gases tóxicos o inflamables. Nuestro equipo está altamente capacitado para identificar y gestionar estos riesgos de manera efectiva.

Nuestros servicios también abarcan trabajos verticales en la industria petroquímica e industrial, donde proporcionamos soluciones para trabajos en estructuras complejas, como torres y chimeneas, utilizando técnicas especializadas de acceso y seguridad.

En RSL Chile, nos comprometemos a brindar servicios de seguridad de la más alta calidad, garantizando la seguridad de su personal y el cumplimiento de las normativas vigentes. Confíe en nuestra experiencia y conocimiento para proteger su empresa en entornos de alto riesgo, permitiéndole operar en sus principales operaciones con tranquilidad y confianza.

Our Network partnership allows you to refuel at any of our 200+ diesel depots at any time both locally and cross-border. With our live systems, you can at any given time plan your refueling trips, manage your fuel spent, keep track of your refueling and immediately do reporting on your fuel.

Cardless / Cashless refueling allows for safe and secured transactions to take place. With an OTP refueling, transactions can be controlled by management. 

Cross-border refueling transactions are safe to control, are paid in your local currency and can be used in multiple countries. 

We have a 24/7 operations team available to assist at any given time and can be contacted via WhatsApp as well for driver's convenience.

Affiliated with all 6 major banks, monies transferred at any given time, will reflect immediately.

 Our network also offers Sleepovers, showers, Truck washes, oil, Canteen, foreign exchanges and cash withdrawals.

Name: Restiani S.p.A.
Description:
Nata nel 1937 come ditta di vendita di legna e carbone, Restiani si è evoluta nel 1953 in una società specializzata nella distribuzione di prodotti petroliferi. Le principali attività dell'azienda includono la vendita di combustibili liquidi e gassosi, lubrificanti, carburanti, oli minerali e altri prodotti energetici.

Nel corso degli anni, Restiani ha ampliato la propria presenza sul mercato acquisendo varie aziende, allargando l'area di operatività e consolidandosi come leader nel nord-ovest dell'Italia.

L'impresa è dedicata al rispetto di principi e valori di responsabilità sociale, con particolare attenzione alla tutela della salute, sicurezza, sostenibilità ambientale e gestione dei rischi, impegnandosi costantemente ogni giorno.

La sua struttura organizzativa consente di soddisfare rapidamente le esigenze di circa 10.000 clienti.

Restiani è riconosciuta per garantire ai propri clienti un servizio tempestivo ed efficiente.

Name: Be Energy Kenya
Description:
Be Energy is a leading supplier of Petroleum and Lubricants, wholesale and retail, in Kenya and East Africa.

With an estimated oil demand growth of average 6.2 % p.a. driven by fast developing economies, the East and Central African region presented a ground breaking opportunity for downstream oil business.
Back in 2004, Be Energy was founded as an addition to the already successful affiliates under Be Energy Group with the sole vision “To be the leader in oil and gas supply for the region”. Few top brand companies existed, and competition was purely under supply and demand. Over the period, increased competition, strict price and capacity regulation has seen survival and growth of only the most efficient and most adapted.

Be Energy’s vision is fulfilled, with presence in East Africa through the marketing and sale of petroleum products to Uganda, DRC, Burundi, South Sudan and Rwanda. 

Be Energy has strategically located retail outlets with an aim of reaching every town in Kenya and Uganda, providing high quality petroleum products and lubricants to its customers. The company continues to rapidly acquire new spacious outlets for a secured wider reach.
Be Energy is the sole distributor of Q8 lubricants from the Kuwait Petroleum Corporation, the best and most dominant brand name within Europe and Middle East. Q8 brand is distinguished for its absolute standards of quality worldwide. Immense technical support is also enjoyed by Be Energy on its Q8 brand of lubricants.

In close partnership with Kuwait International, Be Energy secures the highest standards of safety in its aviation technical operations, winning the confidence of major airlines including Kenya Airways, Martin Air, African Express, Air France and KLM, Egypt Air, Saudi Airlines, CargoLux among others.As mentioned, the East Africa region offered huge untapped market, and Be Energy aggressively expanded by increasing its export volumes.

Founded in 2025, our organization was born out of a simple but powerful idea: to make global trade in commodity chemicals more transparent, efficient, and sustainable. Our early focus was on high-demand commodity chemicals such as PVC, SPVC, EVA, DOP, DOTP, DINP, SBR, NBR, DRC Latex 60%, TIO2,  Off Grades of PVC, TOTM, PU, PE, PP, LDPE, HDPE, LLDPE, PET  serving clients in agriculture, construction, manufacturing, and energy sectors.

What Sets Us Apart
Unlike traditional trading houses, we combine market intelligence, digital platforms, and sustainability practices to deliver value. Our startup spirit means we are agile, customer-focused, and committed to building long-term trust with both suppliers and buyers.

Looking Ahead
We may be young, but our ambition is global. Our vision is to become a trusted partner in the international trade of commodity chemicals, driving innovation in supply chain management and contributing to a more connected, sustainable chemical industry.

Name: Petronafta S.N.C.
Description:
Era il 1969 quando giovanni conti aprì il deposito di carburanti e combustibili in località ponte po a Revello, dove tuttora si trova la sede aziendale.
Da allora la petrolnafta è sempre cresciuta operando nel settore della distribuzione di gasolio da riscaldamento, agricolo e autotrazione e oli lubrificanti
Dal 1982 il figlio Gianfranco prosegue l’attività del papà ampliando fin da subito la gamma di servizi ,acquisendo nuovi depositi commerciali ed aumentando la struttura, il numero dei dipendenti e dei mezzi.Nel 2008 la petrolnafta è anche la prima azienda sul saluzzese ad aprire una stazione di servizio “no logo”, quindi low cost a scarnafigi.
Nel 2011 entra in azienda Giovanni conti, figlio di Gianfranco , attuali soci amministratori della petrolnafta snc
Il 2013 è un anno significativo in quanto la petrolnafta apre il secondo impianto stradale, a Revello in via valle po’, il quale offre prezzi vantaggiosi e competitivi rispetto ai grandi marchi.
Attualmente la petrolnafta possiede anche una stazione di servizio a casteldelfino in provincia di cuneo, nella famosa valle varaita.Da qualche anno, la petrolnafta entra in compartecipazione con la mc petroli srl, azienda che costruisce, gestisce impianti tra cui quello di dorzano (bi) e moncalieri (to) e commercializza carburanti e prodotti petroliferi a Cuneo.
La petrolnafta offre anche il servizio di trasporti in conto terzi per stazioni di servizio.
Fondamentale è la serietà con cui la petrolnafta opera, per la quale è sempre stata contraddistinta, oltre ad avere avuto sempre un occhio di riguardo all’ innovazione tecnologica e al controllo accurato nell’ambito della sicurezza e della qualità, ottenendo da sempre I vari attestati iso.
La petrolnafta infine si approvvigiona solamente da compagnie primarie (eni,esso) garantendo la qualità del prodotto stesso e non ha mai acquistato sul “mercato libero”.

Успешно развивая сложный и ответственный бизнес, мы отличаемся:

Name: Petro Kabir Beniz
Description:
About Petro Kabir Beniz

Petro Kabir Beniz is an integrated industrial and technology company focused on downstream petrochemical production, automotive chemical solutions, and agricultural innovation.
Headquartered in the Maku Free Zone (Iran), the company operates across several specialized sectors including:
	•	Downstream Petrochemical Industries: Manufacturing of AdBlue (DEF AUS32/AUS40), antifreeze, deionized water, windshield fluids, and other automotive additives under the Beniz Chemical brand.
	•	Agrochemical Solutions: Production of high-performance fertilizers such as NPK 20-20-20 + TE, humic-coated urea, and sulfur-coated urea, branded as Petro Farm.
	•	Polymer & Packaging Division: Development and production of HDPE containers, jerrycans, and blow-molded packaging through Petro Plast Beniz.
	•	Digital Industrial Systems: Implementation of Beniz System, an in-house ERP and Business Intelligence platform designed for industrial management, production analytics, and process optimization.

With a strong commitment to quality, innovation, and environmental standards, Petro Kabir Beniz integrates modern data-driven management systems with real industrial expertise to create sustainable value in the petrochemical and agricultural supply chain.

Name: BYU Society of Petroleum Engineering
Description:
The Brigham Young University Chapter of the Society of Petroleum Engineers (BYU SPE) is a student-led organization dedicated to connecting students with the global energy industry and preparing them for successful careers in petroleum and energy engineering. As part of the international Society of Petroleum Engineers, BYU SPE provides opportunities for professional development, technical learning, and networking with industry professionals.

Our chapter hosts guest speakers, technical workshops, and networking events featuring representatives from leading energy companies such as Chevron, Valero, and HF Sinclair. We also organize career preparation events, including résumé reviews, internship panels, and company information sessions.

In addition to professional development, BYU SPE fosters a strong sense of community among chemical and mechanical engineering students interested in the energy field. Members gain insight into current industry trends, build valuable relationships, and develop leadership and teamwork skills through active participation in chapter events and service opportunities.

Whether you’re exploring energy careers, preparing for an internship, or looking to connect with professionals in the field, BYU SPE offers resources and experiences to help you succeed.

Name: NW Freight Broker LLC
Description:
NW Freight Broker LLC is a Private Energy & Commodity Brokerage Firm specializing in connecting verified buyers and sellers of petroleum products worldwide. We facilitate high-value transactions, focusing on Diesel EN590, Jet A1, Crude Oil, LPG, LNG, and other energy commodities. Our Expertise Includes: • Verified Buyer & Seller Matching • NCND & IMFPA Secured Deals • FOB & CIF Delivery Facilitation • Transparent Negotiations & Documentation Support With a global network of credible oil mandates, we ensure smooth and secure transactions for our clients.
Show less
NW Freight Broker LLC is a private company that acts as a broker for energy and commodity products, specifically focused on connecting trusted buyers and sellers of petroleum products around the world. Their main areas of focus include products like Diesel EN590, Jet A1, crude oil, liquefied petroleum gas (LPG), liquefied natural gas (LNG), and other energy-related commodities.
Here are some of the key services they offer:

Matching Buyers and Sellers: They help connect verified buyers with sellers, ensuring that both parties are legitimate.

Securing Deals: They use agreements such as Non-Circumvention Non-Disclosure agreements (NCND) and International Master Fee Protection Agreements (IMFPA) to protect the interests of all parties involved in a transaction.

Delivery Facilitation: They can arrange for delivery of products using different shipping terms, such as FOB (Free on Board) and CIF (Cost, Insurance, and Freight).

Support for Negotiations and Documentation: They provide assistance throughout the negotiation process and help with the necessary paperwork for transactions.


With a wide network of reliable contacts in the oil industry, they aim to ensure that transactions are conducted smoothly and securely for their clients.

Description:

Name: Delaware City Refining Company
Description: The Delaware City refinery has a throughput capacity of 180,000 bpd and a Nelson complexity rating of 13.6. As a result of its configuration and petroleum refinery processing units, Delaware City has the capability to process a diverse heavy slate of crudes with a high concentration of high sulfur crudes making it one of the largest and most complex refineries on the East Coast. The refinery is located on a 5,000-acre site on the Delaware River, with the ability to accept crude by rail or waterborne cargoes. It possesses an extensive distribution network of pipelines, barges and tankers, truck and rail for the distribution of its refined products.
